text: and teens set goals together and check in on progress over time, it creates opportunities for guidance, accountability, and conversation — helping teens stay motivated while learning how to adjust their choices along the way. Many families benefit from tools like True Link that can help: Make spending easy to review together Allow parents to set boundaries aligned with goals Encourage independence without removing oversight The bottom line Building a solid financial foundation for your teen isn’t about getting everything right; it’s about giving them structured opportunities to learn. By starting early, choosing the right tools, and keeping conversations ongoing, you’re helping your teen develop skills that will support them well into adulthood. Nothing contained herein should be construed as caregiving, financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. Always consult the appropriate advisor for your speciﬁc situation.
